title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Sarovar Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Sarovar Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Sarovar Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sarovar Hotels:
Sarovar Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sarovar Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
